title: digitaria sanguinalis var. marginata
intro: Digitaria sanguinalis var. marginata, also known as redstem finger grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Digitaria sanguinalis var. marginata include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
